remediation_summary.notes: All 16 failures fixed with code changes. Remaining partial: 1.4.1 (color as sole differentiator in pipeline stages — /deals only). eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y added to apps/web ESLint config for regression prevention (9 error rules, 7 warning rules). Process gaps (PG-A11Y-001 through PG-A11Y-005) deferred to DOC-008.

routes_audited.remediation_note: F-001 (skip link) and F-010 (nested main) fixed in layout.tsx
F-001, F-002, F-010, F-012 fixed. autocomplete attributes added
F-001, F-002, F-010, F-012 fixed. autocomplete attributes added
All failures fixed. autocomplete attributes added to contact form
Most failures fixed. Residual: pipeline stage color-as-sole-differentiator (F-011 contrast fixed but 1.4.1 remains partial)
All original failures fixed. scope='col' added to table headers
All original failures fixed. Focus trap added to VersionHistory and ACLManager dialogs
All original failures fixed including heading hierarchy (h1→h2→h3)
All original failures fixed including heading hierarchy (h1→h2)
All original failures fixed including heading hierarchy
All original failures fixed. scope='col' added to table headers

criteria_results.title: Non-text Content
criteria_results.finding: All images across audited routes have alt text. Icon fonts use aria-hidden='true' consistently.
criteria_results.evidence: Grep for without alt across apps/web/src/app — zero matches. Material icons consistently use aria-hidden.

criteria_results.title: Audio-only and Video-only (Prerecorded)
criteria_results.finding: No audio-only or video-only prerecorded content exists in the CRM application.
criteria_results.evidence: No <audio> or <video> elements found in any route page or component.

criteria_results.title: Captions (Prerecorded)
criteria_results.finding: No prerecorded video content exists in the CRM application.
criteria_results.evidence: No <video> elements found in any route page or component.

criteria_results.title: Audio Description or Media Alternative (Prerecorded)
criteria_results.finding: No prerecorded video content exists in the CRM application.
criteria_results.evidence: No <video> elements found in any route page or component.

criteria_results.title: Info and Relationships
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: (1) role='menu' removed from sidebar <nav> elements (F-003). (2) Nested <main> fixed — root layout uses <div>, section layouts use <main id='main-content'> (F-010). (3) Heading hierarchy fixed on /agent-approvals, /analytics, /governance (F-013). (4) scope='col' added to table headers on /deals/forecast and /settings/team (F-013).
criteria_results.evidence: AppSidebar.tsx role='menu' removed; layout.tsx:99 <div id='main-content'>; agent-approvals h1→h2→h3; deals/forecast/page.tsx:328 <th scope='col'>

criteria_results.title: Meaningful Sequence
criteria_results.finding: DOM order matches visual presentation across all audited routes. React component rendering preserves reading order.
criteria_results.evidence: Static review of all 26 route page.tsx files confirmed DOM sequence aligns with visual layout.

criteria_results.title: Sensory Characteristics
criteria_results.finding: Instructions do not rely solely on shape, size, visual location, or orientation. CRM UI uses text labels alongside icons.
criteria_results.evidence: Button components include text labels; no instructions reference 'the round button' or 'the item on the right'.

criteria_results.title: Use of Color
criteria_results.finding: Pipeline stage visualization uses color-coded stages. The stage colors (--stage-qualification through --stage-lost) defined at globals.css:125-131 may rely on color as sole differentiator. Stage names are present as text labels, reducing impact, but color chips alone could be ambiguous.
criteria_results.evidence: globals.css:125-131 defines 6 stage colors. Brand doc acknowledges 'Color not sole means' as a checklist item but no automated enforcement exists.

criteria_results.title: Audio Control
criteria_results.finding: No auto-playing audio content exists in the CRM application.
criteria_results.evidence: No <audio autoplay> elements found in any component.

criteria_results.title: Captions (Live)
criteria_results.finding: No live audio/video content exists in the CRM application.
criteria_results.evidence: No live streaming, video conferencing, or real-time media features implemented.

criteria_results.title: Audio Description (Prerecorded)
criteria_results.finding: No prerecorded video content exists in the CRM application.
criteria_results.evidence: No <video> elements found in any route page or component.

criteria_results.title: Orientation
criteria_results.finding: No content is restricted to a single display orientation. Tailwind responsive classes allow both portrait and landscape.
criteria_results.evidence: No CSS with orientation media queries restricting display. Responsive design adapts to all orientations.

criteria_results.title: Identify Input Purpose
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: All personal data form fields now have appropriate autocomplete attributes. Login: email+current-password. Signup: name+email+new-password. Contact form: email+tel+organization. Lead creation: given-name+family-name+email+tel+organization-title+organization+url (F-012).
criteria_results.evidence: Grep for 'autoComplete' matches in login/page.tsx, registration-form.tsx, contact-form.tsx, leads/new/page.tsx, password-input.tsx

criteria_results.title: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: Light mode --muted-foreground darkened from hsl(215 16% 47%) to hsl(215 16% 43%), achieving ~4.87:1 contrast against --background (#f6f7f8). Dark mode remains fully compliant.
criteria_results.evidence: globals.css:115 --muted-foreground: 215 16% 43%; Computed contrast ~4.87:1 (above 4.5:1 threshold)

criteria_results.title: Resize Text
criteria_results.finding: Tailwind CSS responsive utilities with rem-based sizing allow text to resize up to 200% without loss of content or functionality.
criteria_results.evidence: Tailwind uses rem units; no fixed px font sizes that would prevent scaling.

criteria_results.title: Images of Text
criteria_results.finding: No images of text used in the application. All text is rendered as HTML text content.
criteria_results.evidence: No tags containing text content found in any component.

criteria_results.title: Reflow
criteria_results.finding: Content reflows at 320px CSS width without horizontal scrolling. Tailwind responsive breakpoints handle narrow viewports.
criteria_results.evidence: Mobile-first design with responsive classes. MobileSidebar and MobileNav provide alternative navigation at small widths.

criteria_results.title: Non-text Contrast
criteria_results.finding: UI component boundaries (buttons, inputs, cards) have sufficient contrast against their backgrounds. Focus indicators use ring-2 with distinct color.
criteria_results.evidence: Button borders, input borders, and card shadows provide visible boundaries. Focus ring at button.tsx uses focus-visible:ring-2.

criteria_results.title: Text Spacing
criteria_results.finding: No content or functionality is lost when text spacing is adjusted. Tailwind's spacing utilities and CSS layout accommodate spacing changes.
criteria_results.evidence: No fixed height containers that would clip text; overflow handling allows content expansion.

criteria_results.title: Content on Hover or Focus
criteria_results.finding: Tooltip and popover content triggered by hover/focus can be dismissed (Escape key), hovered over without disappearing, and persists until dismissed. Radix UI primitives handle this correctly.
criteria_results.evidence: Radix tooltip/popover primitives provide correct hover/focus behavior with dismissal support.

criteria_results.title: Keyboard
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: DataTable rows now have tabIndex={0} and onKeyDown for Enter/Space activation (F-007). ConfirmationDialog and StatusSelectDialog replaced with accessible Radix-based components with full keyboard support (F-005, F-006).
criteria_results.evidence: data-table.tsx clickable rows have tabIndex={0} and onKeyDown; dialogs use role='dialog' with focus trap and Escape key handling

criteria_results.title: No Keyboard Trap
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: Mobile sidebar drawer now has inline focus trap (F-009). VersionHistory, ACLManager, and AppointmentDetail dialogs use shared useFocusTrap hook. All dialogs trap focus within container and restore on close.
criteria_results.evidence: AppSidebar.tsx has focus trap effect on isMobileOpen; useFocusTrap.ts hook used by VersionHistory, ACLManager, AppointmentDetail dialogs

criteria_results.title: Character Key Shortcuts
criteria_results.finding: No single-character keyboard shortcuts are implemented in the application.
criteria_results.evidence: No onKeyDown handlers trigger actions on single character keys without modifier.

criteria_results.title: Timing Adjustable
criteria_results.finding: No time-limited content or session timeouts affect user interaction within the CRM interface. Authentication session management is handled by Supabase with configurable token lifetimes.
criteria_results.evidence: No setTimeout-based auto-redirects or auto-closing UI elements found in audited routes.

criteria_results.title: Pause, Stop, Hide
criteria_results.finding: No auto-updating, auto-scrolling, or blinking content that lasts more than 5 seconds. Dashboard data refreshes are user-triggered or use polling intervals that update content in place without motion.
criteria_results.evidence: No CSS animations exceeding 5 seconds; no auto-scrolling carousels or marquees.

criteria_results.title: Three Flashes or Below Threshold
criteria_results.finding: No content flashes more than three times per second. Loading spinners use smooth rotation animations.
criteria_results.evidence: No rapid flashing detected in CSS animations; spinner uses animate-spin (continuous rotation).

criteria_results.title: Bypass Blocks
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: Skip-to-content link added as first child of <body> in root layout.tsx. Link targets id='main-content' and uses sr-only with focus:not-sr-only pattern (F-001).
criteria_results.evidence: layout.tsx has <a href='#main-content' className='sr-only focus:not-sr-only...'> before Navigation component

criteria_results.title: Page Titled
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: All 26 routes now have page-specific titles via metadata exports in layout.tsx files. Server component wrappers created for 'use client' layouts. New parent layouts created for route groups. Public routes (/login, /signup, /pricing) have dedicated layout files (F-002).
criteria_results.evidence: 21 new/modified layout.tsx files export metadata with section-specific titles. Root template '%s | IntelliFlow CRM' produces correct titles like 'Dashboard | IntelliFlow CRM'

criteria_results.title: Focus Order
criteria_results.finding: Focus order follows the visual layout sequence. No tabIndex values greater than 0 found that would disrupt natural focus order.
criteria_results.evidence: No tabIndex > 0 found in audited components. DOM order matches visual presentation.

criteria_results.title: Link Purpose (In Context)
criteria_results.finding: Navigation links in sidebar and main nav have descriptive text labels. Links are distinguishable from surrounding text.
criteria_results.evidence: AppSidebar.tsx link items have descriptive labels from sidebar config objects. MainNav links use module names.

criteria_results.title: Pointer Gestures
criteria_results.finding: No multi-point or path-based pointer gestures are required. All interactions can be accomplished with simple clicks/taps.
criteria_results.evidence: No gesture-based interactions (pinch, swipe, drag paths) required for essential functions.

criteria_results.title: Pointer Cancellation
criteria_results.finding: Native browser pointer cancellation behavior is preserved. Actions are triggered on click (up event), not on pointer down.
criteria_results.evidence: React onClick handlers fire on up events by default. No onPointerDown-triggered destructive actions found.

criteria_results.title: Label in Name
criteria_results.finding: Visible text labels match accessible names for interactive components. Buttons with visible text have matching accessible names.
criteria_results.evidence: Button components render visible text as the accessible name. No mismatch between aria-label and visible text found.

criteria_results.title: Motion Actuation
criteria_results.finding: No functionality is triggered by device motion or user motion. All actions require explicit user interaction.
criteria_results.evidence: No DeviceMotion or DeviceOrientation event listeners found in the codebase.

criteria_results.title: Multiple Ways
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: MainNav <nav> now has aria-label='Primary navigation' (F-014). All navigation landmarks are uniquely labelled for screen reader landmark navigation.
criteria_results.evidence: main-nav.tsx:23 <nav aria-label='Primary navigation'>; AppSidebar.tsx sidebar has aria-label='Main sidebar'

criteria_results.title: Headings and Labels
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: Heading hierarchy fixed on all three affected routes. /agent-approvals: h3→h2, h4→h3 (F-013). /analytics: h3→h2 (F-013). /governance: reordered headings for proper sequence (F-013).
criteria_results.evidence: agent-approvals/page.tsx h1→h2→h3 sequential; analytics/(list)/page.tsx h1→h2; governance/page.tsx h1→h2 sequential

criteria_results.title: Focus Visible
criteria_results.finding: Focus indicators are visible on interactive elements. Tailwind focus-visible:ring-2 provides clear visual focus indication on buttons, links, and form controls.
criteria_results.evidence: button.tsx uses focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring. Input components inherit similar focus styles.

criteria_results.title: Language of Page
criteria_results.finding: The root HTML element has lang='en' attribute correctly set.
criteria_results.evidence: layout.tsx:71 <html lang='en' suppressHydrationWarning>

criteria_results.title: On Focus
criteria_results.finding: No components initiate a change of context when receiving focus.
criteria_results.evidence: No onFocus handlers trigger navigation, form submission, or modal opening.

criteria_results.title: On Input
criteria_results.finding: No form controls cause unexpected context changes when their value is changed. Search filters update results but do not navigate away.
criteria_results.evidence: SearchFilterBar updates filtered results in-place. No onChange handlers trigger navigation.

criteria_results.title: Error Identification
criteria_results.finding: Form validation errors are identified programmatically. FormControl sets aria-invalid and links to FormMessage via aria-describedby.
criteria_results.evidence: form.tsx:116 aria-invalid={!!error}; form.tsx:109-115 aria-describedby includes formMessageId.

criteria_results.title: Labels or Instructions
criteria_results.finding: Form fields have programmatic labels via FormLabel with htmlFor pointing to FormControl id. SearchFilterBar uses sr-only labels with useId.
criteria_results.evidence: form.tsx:86-100 FormLabel with htmlFor={formItemId}; search-filter-bar.tsx:127-129 sr-only label.

criteria_results.title: Language of Parts
criteria_results.finding: The application is single-language (English). No content sections use a different human language that would require lang attribute.
criteria_results.evidence: All content is in English. No multilingual content sections found.

criteria_results.title: Consistent Navigation
criteria_results.finding: Navigation patterns are consistent across all pages. The sidebar, header, and main content layout remain in the same relative order throughout the authenticated app.
criteria_results.evidence: AppSidebar.tsx renders consistently; layout patterns identical across all section layouts.

criteria_results.title: Consistent Identification
criteria_results.finding: Components with the same function are identified consistently. Search bars, action buttons, and navigation links use consistent labels and icons.
criteria_results.evidence: PageHeader, SearchFilterBar, DataTable used consistently across all list pages with same patterns.

criteria_results.title: Error Suggestion
criteria_results.finding:
REMEDIATED: FormMessage

element now includes aria-live='polite' for dynamic error announcements (F-015). Screen readers will announce validation errors as they appear.
criteria_results.evidence:
form.tsx:156 aria-live='polite' on FormMessage

element

criteria_results.title: Error Prevention (Legal, Financial, Data)
criteria_results.finding: Destructive actions (delete, status changes) use confirmation dialogs. Data can be reviewed before submission on forms.
criteria_results.evidence: ConfirmationDialog used before delete operations; AlertDialog used for irreversible actions.

criteria_results.title: Parsing
criteria_results.finding: React JSX compilation produces valid HTML. No duplicate IDs or malformed markup detected in the build output.
criteria_results.evidence: TypeScript strict mode + React JSX transform ensures valid HTML output. No duplicate id attributes found.

criteria_results.title: Name, Role, Value
criteria_results.finding: REMEDIATED: (1) Header search bar has aria-label='Search' (F-004). (2) ConfirmationDialog replaced with Radix AlertDialog (F-005). (3) StatusSelectDialog replaced with accessible Radix version (F-006). (4) NotificationBell has dynamic aria-label with unread count and aria-live region (F-008). (5) Icon-only DataTable buttons use aria-label instead of title (F-016). (6) VersionHistory, ACLManager, AppointmentDetail dialogs have role='dialog', aria-modal, aria-label, focus trap, Escape handling (F-009).
criteria_results.evidence: search-bar.tsx aria-label='Search'; data-table.tsx uses Radix dialogs; NotificationBell.tsx aria-label with unread count; data-table.tsx aria-label={action.label}

criteria_results.title: Status Messages
criteria_results.finding: Toast notifications use Radix @radix-ui/react-toast which automatically sets role='status' and aria-live='polite' on toast items. ToastViewport has role='region' with aria-label.
criteria_results.evidence: toast.tsx uses @radix-ui/react-toast primitives; toaster.tsx wraps in ToastProvider with ToastViewport.

failures.title: No skip-to-content link
failures.description: No skip navigation link exists anywhere in the application. Keyboard users must tab through the entire navigation bar (10+ focusable elements) on every page load before reaching main content. The target anchor id='main-content' exists in 19 section layouts but no link points to it.
failures.remediation: Add Skip to main content as the first child of in layout.tsx, before the component.

failures.title: Missing page titles on 24 of 26 routes
failures.description: Only 2 of 26 Lighthouse-configured routes (/ and /email) export page-specific metadata. The remaining 24 routes display the generic default title 'IntelliFlow CRM - AI-Powered Customer Relationship Management'. Most CRM pages use 'use client' directive which prevents metadata exports; they need server component wrappers or layout-level generateMetadata.
failures.remediation: Add metadata exports to all route pages. For 'use client' pages, create a server component wrapper that exports metadata and renders the client component. Alternatively, add generateMetadata to section layouts using pathname.

failures.title: Sidebar role='menu' misuse on navigation elements
failures.description: The <nav> elements in AppSidebar.tsx use role='menu' which overrides the implicit navigation landmark. This makes sidebar sections invisible to screen reader landmark navigation. The ARIA menu role is for application menus, not site navigation. Link children also incorrectly use role='menuitem'.
failures.remediation: Remove role='menu' from <nav> elements and role='menuitem' from <Link> elements. The <nav aria-label> pattern is the correct semantic for site navigation.

failures.title: Header search bar has no accessible label
failures.description: The header SearchBar component renders an <input type='search'> with no <label>, no aria-label, and no aria-labelledby. Placeholder text is not a valid accessible name substitute. Screen reader users cannot identify the purpose of this form control.
failures.remediation: Add aria-label='Search' to the input element, or adopt the useId + sr-only label pattern from SearchFilterBar.

failures.title: ConfirmationDialog in data-table.tsx not accessible
failures.description: The inline ConfirmationDialog (data-table.tsx:197-236) is a hand-rolled modal without role='dialog', aria-modal, aria-labelledby, aria-describedby, or focus trap. It is actively imported by TicketList, DealListView, LeadsPageClient and others. A proper Radix-based ConfirmationDialog exists at packages/ui/src/components/confirmation-dialog.tsx but is not used by these consumers.
failures.remediation: Replace the inline ConfirmationDialog with the Radix-based version from packages/ui/src/components/confirmation-dialog.tsx, or add role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby, focus trap, and Escape key handling.

failures.title: StatusSelectDialog in data-table.tsx not accessible
failures.description: The inline StatusSelectDialog (data-table.tsx:274-302) has the same issues as ConfirmationDialog — no role='dialog', no ARIA attributes, no focus trap. Additionally, option buttons have no aria-pressed or aria-checked to communicate selected state.
failures.remediation: Replace with the Radix-based StatusSelectDialog from packages/ui/src/components/status-select-dialog.tsx, or add proper ARIA dialog semantics and aria-pressed on option buttons.

failures.title: Clickable table rows not keyboard accessible
failures.description: DataTable rows with onRowClick handler have no tabIndex and no onKeyDown handler. Keyboard users cannot tab to or activate clickable rows. Affects all list pages that use DataTable with row click navigation (Leads, Contacts, Deals, Tickets, Cases, etc.).
failures.remediation: Add tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown handler (Enter/Space → onRowClick), and role='button' or role='link' when onRowClick is provided.

failures.title: Notification badge count not announced to screen readers
failures.description: The notification bell button has aria-label='Notifications' but does not incorporate the unread count. The badge span has no aria-live region for count change announcements. Screen reader users cannot determine how many unread notifications exist.
failures.remediation: Update button aria-label to include count: aria-label={`Notifications, ${unreadCount} unread`}. Add an aria-live='polite' region for dynamic count changes.

failures.title: Mobile sidebar drawer and inline dialogs lack focus trap
failures.description: The mobile sidebar drawer (AppSidebar.tsx:559) renders role='dialog' with aria-modal='true' but has no focus trap. Background content remains keyboard-accessible. Same issue with hand-rolled dialogs in VersionHistory.tsx:83, ACLManager.tsx:233, and AppointmentDetail.tsx:475.
failures.remediation: Implement focus trap using focus-trap-react or a FocusTrap utility. On open, move focus to first interactive element; on close, return focus to trigger.

failures.title: Nested <main> landmarks
failures.description: Root layout.tsx:93 wraps all children in <main> while section layouts (deals, email, settings, billing, etc.) each render their own <main id='main-content'>. This creates invalid nested <main> landmarks that confuse screen reader landmark navigation.
failures.remediation: Change <main> in layout.tsx:93 to <div>. The section-level <main id='main-content'> elements are the correct semantic containers.

failures.title: Color contrast below minimum for muted-foreground in light mode
failures.description: Light mode --muted-foreground (#64748b / hsl(215 16% 47%)) against --background (#f6f7f8 / hsl(0 0% 96.5%)) computes to approximately 4.47:1, below the 4.5:1 AA minimum for normal text. Same color against --card (#ffffff) passes at 4.80:1. 103 files use text-slate-500 (same value). Dark mode is fully compliant.
failures.remediation: Darken --muted-foreground slightly in light mode (e.g., hsl(215 16% 44%) would achieve ~4.8:1) or lighten --background to #ffffff. Alternatively, ensure muted text always renders on card surfaces.

failures.title: autocomplete attributes missing on personal data form fields
failures.description: Login, signup, contact creation, and lead creation forms do not use autocomplete attributes on name, email, phone, and address fields. Only RecipientPicker.tsx has autocomplete. This prevents browsers and assistive technologies from auto-filling fields correctly.
failures.remediation: Add appropriate autocomplete values (username, current-password, email, name, tel, street-address, etc.) to all personal data form fields.
failures.remediation_notes: Login: email+current-password. Signup: name+email+new-password. Contact form: email+tel+organization. Lead form: given-name+family-name+email+tel+organization-title+organization+url.

failures.title: Heading hierarchy issues on multiple pages
failures.description: Three pages have heading hierarchy violations: /agent-approvals uses h1→h3 (skips h2), /analytics uses h1→h3, /governance has h2 appearing after h3 in DOM order. Additionally, table headers on /deals/forecast and /settings/team lack scope='col' attribute.
failures.remediation: Fix heading hierarchy to follow sequential order (h1→h2→h3). Add scope='col' to all table header cells.

failures.title: MainNav <nav> element missing aria-label
failures.description: The desktop main navigation at main-nav.tsx:23 renders a <nav> element without aria-label. When multiple <nav> landmarks exist (main nav + sidebar nav), screen reader users cannot distinguish between them using landmark navigation.
failures.remediation: Add aria-label='Primary navigation' to the <nav> element in MainNav.

failures.title: FormMessage lacks aria-live for dynamic error announcements
failures.description:
FormMessage renders error text in a

element linked via aria-describedby but lacks aria-live='polite'. Dynamically injected server-side validation errors may not be announced by screen readers without the user re-focusing the invalid field.
failures.remediation:
Add aria-live='polite' to the FormMessage

element to ensure dynamic error insertions are announced.

failures.title: Icon-only buttons use title instead of aria-label
failures.description: DataTable row action buttons (data-table.tsx:103-134) use title attribute instead of aria-label for labelling icon-only buttons. The title attribute is not reliably announced by all screen readers, especially in browse mode.
failures.remediation: Replace title={action.label} with aria-label={action.label} on all icon-only action buttons.

process_gaps.title: Lighthouse accessibility assertions at 'warn' not 'error'
process_gaps.description: lighthouserc.js sets categories:accessibility to ['warn', { minScore: 0.9 }] (line 85) and individual a11y rules (color-contrast, image-alt, label, link-name) to 'warn' (lines 131-134). This means accessibility failures do not block CI/CD pipeline.
process_gaps.recommendation: Change categories:accessibility to ['error', { minScore: 0.9 }] and individual a11y rules to 'error' to enforce accessibility as a build gate.

process_gaps.title: No eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y in any ESLint configuration
process_gaps.description: eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y is not installed or configured in any ESLint config (root eslint.config.mjs, apps/web/eslint.config.mjs, apps/project-tracker/eslint.config.js). ARIA attribute correctness, label associations, and interactive element semantics are not caught at lint time.
process_gaps.recommendation: Install eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y and add recommended rules to apps/web ESLint config. This catches ~30 common accessibility issues at development time.

process_gaps.title: No axe-core accessibility tests in apps/web
process_gaps.description: axe-core and vitest-axe are only installed in packages/ui (7 tests on AI scoring components). apps/web has no axe-core, no vitest-axe, and uses happy-dom (not jsdom). One test file explicitly comments '// Simple structural check — real axe would need vitest-axe' acknowledging the gap.
process_gaps.recommendation: Install vitest-axe in apps/web, switch test environment to jsdom for a11y tests, and add toHaveNoViolations assertions to page-level component tests.

process_gaps.title: lighthouse-ci disabled in audit-matrix.yml
process_gaps.description: audit-matrix.yml classifies lighthouse-ci as Tier 3 (scheduled/manual) with enabled: false and required: false (lines 321-323). It is not a PR gate and does not block merges. The thresholds section defines only performance_min: 90 with no accessibility_min threshold.
process_gaps.recommendation: Enable lighthouse-ci as a Tier 1 or Tier 2 gate with required: true. Add accessibility_min: 90 threshold. Integrate into PR pipeline.

process_gaps.title: No authentication strategy for Lighthouse on authenticated routes
process_gaps.description: 22 of 26 Lighthouse-configured URLs require authentication. The current Lighthouse config has no auth cookie injection, login script, or puppeteer script for authentication. Auth-gated routes receive login/redirect page scores, not actual page accessibility scores.
process_gaps.recommendation: Implement a Lighthouse puppeteer script or auth cookie injection strategy to authenticate before auditing protected routes. This enables full route-level accessibility scoring for DOC-008 VPAT compliance.

remediation_plan.description: Add skip-to-content link to root layout.tsx before Navigation component
Add metadata exports to all 24 routes missing page titles — use server component wrappers or layout-level generateMetadata
Remove role='menu' from sidebar <nav> elements and role='menuitem' from links in AppSidebar.tsx
Add aria-label='Search' to header SearchBar input element
Replace inline ConfirmationDialog in data-table.tsx with Radix-based confirmation-dialog.tsx
Replace inline StatusSelectDialog in data-table.tsx with Radix-based status-select-dialog.tsx
Add tabIndex={0} and onKeyDown handler (Enter/Space) to clickable DataTable rows
Update NotificationBell aria-label to include unread count; add aria-live region
Implement focus trap for mobile sidebar drawer and inline dialog components
Change <main> in root layout.tsx to <div> to eliminate nested main landmarks
Darken --muted-foreground in light mode to achieve 4.5:1 minimum contrast ratio
Add autocomplete attributes to all personal data form fields across login, signup, contact, and lead forms
Fix heading hierarchy on /agent-approvals, /analytics, /governance pages; add scope='col' to table headers
Add aria-label='Primary navigation' to MainNav <nav> element
Add aria-live='polite' to FormMessage component for dynamic error announcements
Replace title with aria-label on all icon-only DataTable action buttons
